title: Inventory movements
description: Branch kardex: receipts, issues, shrinkage and adjustments. Each line is immutable and updates branch stock.

sin_sedes.title: No active branches
sin_sedes.description: Create an active branch to attach movements and stock.

empty.no_records_description: Record a receipt, issue or shrinkage, or adjust stock under Inventory › Stock.
empty.no_results_description: Try different filters or search terms.

search_placeholder: Search by product, SKU or notes…

modal.title: New movement
modal.description: Quantity is always positive; the type defines whether it adds or subtracts from branch stock.
modal.lote_hint: If omitted, the batch will be recorded as SIN-LOTE.
modal.salida_fefo_hint: Outbound movements and shrinkage deduct from the earliest-expiring batch (FEFO).
modal.traslado_hint: Leaves origin by FEFO and enters the destination with the same batch and expiry.
